details: All public aggregate tables must contain rows.
Every contracted source table must contain data.
actual_payment must equal total_amount minus discount.

expected_value: segments cover all users exactly once
details: Customer segments must be mutually exclusive and exhaustive.
Daily commerce totals must reconcile to the order fact.
Published headline KPIs must reconcile to cleaned facts.
days_since_last_order sentinel values are not used in business metrics.
Published order and behavior facts require valid user and product parents.
Only pure pre-registration temporal anomalies may be quarantined without blocking publication.
DWD must retain every valid behavior.
DWD must retain every valid order.
Shipping and receipt timestamps must match lifecycle state and sequence.
Orders or behaviors before registration are quarantined as temporal anomalies.
All six business keys must be unique.
Audit-only product feature counts must match independent source fact aggregation.
Invalid source rows are isolated and excluded from business aggregates.
Every source row must land in exactly one ODS outcome.
User-level sequential stage counts may never increase.
unit_price × quantity is not treated as authoritative because the source total_amount uses an undocumented adjustment.
Audit-only user feature counts must match independent source fact aggregation.
